title: McCarthy Tétrault Partners Recognized for Outstanding Client Service
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Partners Recognized for Outstanding Client Service
McCarthy Tétrault is proud to announce that two partners were recognized at the 2020 Lexology Client Choice awards for excellence in client service.
Nominated by corporate counsel, this recognition demonstrates a proven commitment to success and strong relationships to deliver value for clients. Congratulations to:
- Oliver Borgers : Competition & Antitrust, Ontario
- Christian Meighen : Corporate Tax, Québec
Oliver and Christian were each distinguished as exclusive winners in their category and region.
The Lexology Client Choice awards recognize partners around the world for providing superior client service. To identify winners, corporate counsel are asked to rate individual lawyers and law firms on specific client service criteria, namely: quality of legal advice, value for money, commercial awareness, effective communication, billing transparency, tailored fee structures, response time, sharing of expertise and use of technology.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
- Oliver J. Borgers Counsel People.Offices.Singular Toronto
People.Offices.Singular Toronto
- Christian Meighen Partner People.Offices.Singular Montréal
